task_objective: Fix restore no-op reporting and make 'Last Operation' skip text operation-aware.
design_decisions: Used existing _result_change() helper in lifecycle.py to inspect the ludusavi change payload for point-in-time restores.
Made getLastOperationText() in the frontend accept an optional operation argument to emit operation-aware skip labels.
Ensured backward compatibility when operation is null.
Delegated Steam Deck testing until after dev release is built.
results: All tests and quality gates passed (coverage 85.91%, test:unit passed). Working branch merged to dev and dev release dispatched.
